app_release_notes: v1.2.14 - The sidebar's "New Ladder" button is now "Create New Load," with a prominent picker so you can start a fresh load from a saved rifle in one click. Right-click any saved rifle in Libraries to create a new load with it, see or compare its loads, print a DOPE card, or duplicate, rename, or delete it.
